Adaptability: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
Aerilate: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
Aftermath: Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.
Analytic: Attack power increases by 30% if the Pokémon is the last Pokémon to attack this turn.
Anger Point: Raises Attack upon taking a critical hit.
Armor Tail: Prevents priority moves against this Pokémon and allies.
Aroma Veil: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.
Berserk: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to become half or less.
Big Pecks: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.
Blaze: Strengthens fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
Bulletproof: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.
Cheek Pouch: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.
Clear Body: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
Cloud Nine: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
Commander: When Tatsugiri enters battle with Dondozo, it goes into Dondozo's mouth and boosts all of Dondozo's stats.
Commander Surge: Dragon and Water moves gain 30% power. On Mega Evolution, raises ally's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.
Competitive: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
Corrosion: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it’s a Steel or Poison type.
Cud Chew: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.
Curious Medicine: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.
Cursed Body: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.
Cute Charm: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
Defiant: When its stats are lowered its Attack increases.
Disguise: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
Dragonize: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.
Drizzle: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
Drought: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle.
Dry Skin: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.
Early Bird: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
Earth Eater: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
Electromorphosis: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
Fairy Aura: Powers up each Pokémon's Fairy-type moves.
Filter: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokémon.
Flash Fire: Protects against fire moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.
Flower Veil: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.
Forecast: Changes the Pokémon's type and appearance based on the weather in battle.
Frisk: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.
Gale Wings: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
Gluttony: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.
Gooey: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.
Harvest: May create another Berry after one is used. 100% chance in sunshine.
Healer: Sometimes cures the status conditions of the Pokémon's allies.
Heatproof: Halves damage from fire moves and burns.
Hospitality: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
Hunger Switch: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.
Hydration: Heals status problems if it is raining.
Hyper Cutter: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.
Ice Body: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.
Illuminate: By illuminating its surroundings, the Pokémon prevents its accuracy from being lowered.
Illusion: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokémon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.
Imposter: Transforms into the foe on entry.
Infiltrator: Passes through the opposing Pokémon's barrier, substitute, and the like and strikes.
Innards Out: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.
Inner Focus: The Pokémon's intensely focused, and that prevents it from flinching.
Intimidate: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.
Justified: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.
Leaf Guard: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
Levitate: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.
Lightning Rod: Redirects single-target electric moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
Liquid Voice: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.
Long Reach: This Pokémon's moves do not make contact.
Magic Bounce: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
Magic Guard: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.
Magician: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
Marvel Scale: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
Mega Sol: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.
Merciless: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
Mimicry: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.
Mold Breaker: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.
Moody: Raises one stat and lowers another.
Motor Drive: Absorbs electric moves, raising Speed one stage.
Moxie: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.
Multiscale: Reduces damage taken when HP is full.
Mummy: Contact with this Pokémon spreads this Ability.
No Guard: Ensures that all moves used by and against the Pokémon land.
Opportunist: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.
Overcoat: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather.
Overgrow: Strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
Pickpocket: Steals an item when hit by another Pokémon.
Piercing Drill: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal.
Pixilate: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
Poison Heal: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.
Poison Touch: May poison targets when a Pokémon makes contact.
Prankster: Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.
Protean: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use.
Purifying Salt: Prevents status and halves Ghost damage.
Queenly Majesty: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
Quick Draw: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.
Quick Feet: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.
Rain Dish: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.
Receiver: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.
Reckless: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.
Refrigerate: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
Regenerator: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.
Ripen: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.
Rivalry: Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.
Rock Head: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.
Sand Force: Boosts the power of Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves in a sandstorm.
Sand Rush: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
Sand Spit: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.
Sand Stream: The Pokémon summons a sandstorm when it enters a battle.
Sap Sipper: Boosts Attack when hit by a Grass-type move.
Scrappy: The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
Screen Cleaner: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.
Shadow Tag: The Pokémon steps on the opposing Pokémon's shadow to prevent it from fleeing or switching out.
Sheer Force: Removes additional effects from moves but increases their power.
Shell Armor: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
Skill Link: Maximizes the number of times multistrike moves hit.
Slush Rush: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.
Sniper: Powers up moves if they are critical hits.
Snow Warning: The Pokémon makes it snow when it enters a battle.
Solar Power: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted, but HP decreases every turn.
Spicy Spray: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
Stall: The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.
Stalwart: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
Stance Change: Changes aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using kings shield.
Static: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.
Steadfast: Raises Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.
Sticky Hold: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.
Storm Drain: Draws in all Water-type moves to boost its Sp. Atk stat.
Strong Jaw: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.
Super Luck: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.
Supersweet Syrup: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.
Supreme Overlord: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.
Swarm: Powers up Bug-type moves when HP is low.
Sweet Veil: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.
Symbiosis: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.
Synchronize: Passes poison, paralysis, or burn to the attacker.
Tangled Feet: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.
Technician: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.
Telepathy: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.
Thick Fat: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.
Torrent: Strengthens water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
Tough Claws: Powers up moves that make direct contact.
Toxic Debris: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
Trace: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon copies an opposing Pokémon's Ability.
Unaware: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.
Unburden: Raises Speed if a held item is used.
Unnerve: Makes the foe nervous and unable to eat Berries.
Unseen Fist: The Pokémon can deal damage with moves that make physical contact, even if the target is protected.
Wandering Spirit: Exchanges ability with attacker on contact.
Water Absorb: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.
Water Bubble: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.
Weak Armor: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
White Smoke: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
Zero To Hero: Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.
